title: 3D Dinosaur Puzzles,Dinosaur Toys,3D Wooden Puzzle,3D Puzzles,Dino Model,Wooden Puzzle for Kids and Adults,Puzzl Education Toys for Kids
features: ⭐4 Kinds of Dinosaur Models⭐: Consisting of Tyrannosaurus, Triceratops, Paractenosaurus, Stegosaurus, not only bring you the fun of assembling, but also let you experience the beauty of animal structure
⭐ Difficulty Level ⭐: Beginner, Each dinosaur is assembled from 30-45 pieces of wood, suitable for beginners over 6years old, you can use this product to experience the fun of assembling
⭐Material Safety⭐: Made of laser-cut wood, the parts are smoothly cut and fit perfectly. Parts that have broken off may be stained or intact. No scissors and no glue required. can be reused
⭐Ready to Assemble⭐: No additional tools required. Numbered parts and detailed illustrated instructions make assembly easy. Discover the secret of the machinery and stimulate the creative potential.
⭐Best Gift⭐: Enjoy the great parent-child interaction game and create all kinds of 3D wooden dinosaur animals. It is the best birthday/Children's Day/Christmas/New Year gift for family or friends.
description: Product Description ZPPLD DIY 3-D WOODEN DINOSAUR PUZZLES: 4 ASSORTED DINOSAUR PUZZLES Family Toy: Enjoy the great parent-child interaction game and create all kinds of 3D wooden dinosaur animals. Showing children the world of animal kingdom. Benefits of Building Toys: ✔️ Enhances Spatial Awareness ✔️ Encourages Thinking and Reasoning ✔️ Involves Focus and Patience ✔️ Sparks the Imagination! ✔️ Helps Develop Problem Solving Skills ✔️ Encourages Children to Use Their Minds Instead of Relying on Technology ✔️ Can Lead Into Creative and Imaginary Play ✔️ Helps Develop Math Skills ✔️ Encourages Cooperative Play SMOOTH WOODEN PUZZLE PIECES All puzzles come in easy-to-punch-out pieces from wooden boards with each puzzle piece having smooth finished grooved edges and no jagged edges to make it safe for children. Keep your kids safe while letting them have fun! STIMULATING INTERACTIVE FUN Stimulate your children's brains with this educational but fun interactive 3D puzzle! It will enhance your kids' focus, creativity, fine motor skills, and patience to craft together these elaborate three dimensional puzzles Pain Your Own Dinosaur These 3D wooden puzzles are a blank slate for you to unleash your creativity and add personalizing touches to your puzzles. It is unpainted so you can paint your puzzles in whatever colors you want to bring it to life. How to assemble Read the manual first, and have a certain understanding of the assembly steps of dinosaurs and the corresponding plates Remove the assembly board from the whole board. Be careful not to remove all the components at one time, you need to assemble while removing. If you remove it all at once, it will be a mess in the back Assemble the dinosaurs according to the instructions and the connection between the plates, After the dinosaur is finished, if there are parts that are not firmly connected, you can reinforce them 3D Puzzle 3D Wooden Puzzle with Music Box 3D Puzzle 3D Car Model 3D Fighter Model Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 106 3.1 out of 5 stars 6 4.2 out of 5 stars 106 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £12.50 £ 12 . 50 £10.50 £ 10 . 50 £12.50 £ 12 . 50 — no data £8.50 £ 8 . 50 Material Wooden Wooden Wooden paper paper Quantity 4 4 1 1 1 Difficulty 3 stars 2 stars 4 stars 4 stars 4 stars
